tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends
Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
This is an exact version of the song in the key that Green Day plays it. If the chords 
are too difficult, transpose them down one half step and put a capo on the first fret to 
make it easier.

[ch]Fm[/ch]  133111
[ch]Db[/ch]  x46664
[ch]Ab[/ch]  466544
[ch]Eb[/ch]  x6888x
[ch]C[/ch]   x3555x
[ch]Bb[/ch]  x1333x


[Intro]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   x6
(2 beats per chord)[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
Hear the sound of the falling rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]
Coming down like an Armageddon flame (Hey!)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Db[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
The shame, the ones who died without a name[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Hear the dogs howling out of key[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]
To a hymn called "Faith and Misery" (Hey!)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Db[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
And bleed, the company lost the war today[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]
I beg to dream and differ from the hollow lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
This is the dawning of the rest of our lives[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
On holiday[/tab]

[ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Hear the drum pounding out of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Fm[/ch]
Another protester has crossed the line (Hey!)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
To find, the money's on the other side[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
Can I get another Amen? (Amen!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
There's a flag wrapped around a score of men (Hey!)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
A gag, a plastic bag on a monument[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]
I beg to dream and differ from the hollow lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
